# Auto-generated prettier chain signature. Do not edit manually.
# Regenerate: deno task fixtures:update:formatted <pattern>
#
# Each %%PASS=N%% section is exactly prettier^N(output_prettier.<ext>).
# This file exists when prettier is non-idempotent on output_prettier.* — it pins
# the full chain so the audit recognizes the case and the validator catches drift.
# See docs/fixture_overview.md (rule F4) and crates/tsv_debug/src/fixtures/audit_signature.rs.

%%PASS=2 (fixed point)%%
<script lang="ts">
	// Own-line block comment after a type predicate's `is`, predicate type on the
	// next line hanging indented one level.
	function f(x): x /* a */ is T {
		return true;
	}

	// A same-line block comment trailing `is` (no preceding newline) with the
	// predicate type on the next line stays trailing `is`, type hanging.
	function g(x): x /* b */ is U {
		return true;
	}

	// A same-line block comment glued to the type stays fully inline.
	function h(x): x is /* c */ V {
		return true;
	}
</script>
